data.title: New Richmond American Community Desert Bloom at Monarch in Marana to host Grand Opening event on March 7, 2026.
data.description: Monarch's Desert Bloom is preparing for a grand unveiling on March 7 in Marana, Arizona. Scheduled for March 4, 2026, Richmond American Homes of Arizona, a branch of Sekisui House U.S., reveals exciting news about the inauguration of Desert Bloom at Monarch.

data.title: Viper Energy to offer 17,391,304 shares of stock via secondary offering by Diamondback Energy and affiliates, with potential for 2,608,696 more shares sold by Selling Stockholders.
data.description: Viper Energy, Inc. unveiled a secondary offering of 17,391,304 shares of its Class A common stock by the Selling Stockholders, including Diamondback Energy, Inc., EnCap Investments, L.P., and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. The Secondary Offering is subject to market conditions, with an option for underwriters to acquire up to 2,608,696 additional shares from Viper. Viper itself will not gain any proceeds from this offering.

data.title: Travelers face ongoing flight cancellations due to US-Israel conflict with Iran, leading to endless disruptions worldwide.
data.description: Despite being located far from major cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, residents in the area are feeling the impact of increasing violence, with many experiencing frequent flight cancellations. The continuous disruptions have left individuals struggling as they navigate through the chaos, facing one cancellation after another.

data.title: TAP Real Estate Technologies changes name from HUMBL, with new ticker symbol RWAX, focusing on real estate.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, TAP Real Estate Technologies, Inc. (formerly HUMBL, Inc.) revealed its name change along with a new ticker symbol, RWAX (OTC: RWAX). This change signifies the company's shift towards real estate and digital infrastructure to revamp the issuance, registration, and trading of physical assets. The move emphasizes a strategic move towards modernization in San Diego, California.

data.title: Tecsys Inc. reports Q3 fiscal 2026 results with record Adjusted EBITDA up 43%; SaaS revenue at $20.1M, total revenue $48.5M. Maintaining FY26 guidance: Total Revenue Growth 8-10%, SaaS Growth 20-22%, EBITDA i Margin 8-9%. 7% workforce reduction for $4.5M restructuring charge, estimated $8.1M savings. Share buyback of 115,000 shares for $3.7M.
data.description: Tecsys Inc. (TSX: TCS) reported record Adjusted EBITDA for the third quarter of fiscal 2026, with a 43% increase over the same period last year. The SaaS revenue saw a 17% increase to $20.1 million, SaaS ARR increased by 10% to $83.3 million, and SaaS Remaining Performance Obligation increased by 18% to $248.9 million. Total revenue for Q3 2026 was $48.5 million, with a net profit of $1.7 million. Year-to-date performance for the first nine months of fiscal 2026 showed a SaaS revenue increase of 21% to $58.9 million, total revenue of $143.1 million, net profit of $4.3 million, and Adjusted EBITDA of $13.3 million. Tecsys acquired 115,000 of its outstanding common shares for approximately $3.7 million in Q3 2026 as part of its ongoing Normal Course Issuer Bid. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.09 per share. Financial guidance for fiscal year 2026 includes total revenue growth of 8-10%, SaaS revenue growth of 20-22%, and an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 8-9%. The company also implemented a 7% workforce reduction for an estimated restructuring charge of $4.5 million to generate $8.1 million in annual operating cost savings. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: W&T Offshore delays Q4 and full year 2025 earnings release & conference call scheduled for March 5th and 6th.
data.description: Houston-based company W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE: WTI) has disclosed the rescheduling of the release of its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Originally planned to be released on March 5, 2026, after NYSE trading hours, the release and subsequent conference call have been postponed. The new dates are set for March 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time).

data.title: Rigetti's Q4 earnings in line with views but revenue falls short of estimates. Investor's Business Daily reports.
data.description: As the earnings reports for quantum computing stocks come to a close, Rigetti posted a Q4 adjusted loss that was in line with expectations, while falling short of revenue estimates. This update on Quantum Computing Stocks highlights Rigetti's earnings meeting views but revenue coming in below estimates.

data.title: Okta beats Q4 earnings estimates, with fiscal 2027 revenue outlook meeting expectations. Stock performing well.
data.description: Okta exceeded earnings expectations for the fourth quarter. Sales guidance for fiscal 2027 stock met expectations. The information comes from a recent report on Investor's Business Daily, mentioning the cybersecurity firm's performance.

data.title: EQT stock sees Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating strong technical performance. Will momentum continue?
data.description: EQT has recently received an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. This improvement suggests a potential for continued positive movement in the stock. The upgraded rating highlights the strong performance of EQT in comparison to its peers, reflecting promising prospects for potential investors. This news suggests that EQT is "cooking with gas" and may be a stock worth keeping an eye on for those interested in potential growth opportunities.

data.title: Stock market rebounds with major indexes still below 50-day lines. Broadcom earnings beat expectations.
data.description: On Wednesday, the stock market saw a strong rally, although the major indices are still trading below their respective 50-day moving averages. In significant news, Broadcom reported earnings that exceeded expectations after the market closed. Despite the rebound in the market, it is important to note that it has not yet surpassed crucial levels. The Dow Jones Futures were notably impacted by these developments.

data.title: Dow Jones slipped but rebounded, Nasdaq higher amid Iran, tariff news. Nvidia, Tesla stocks bounced back. (Words: 96)
data.description: Early on Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to news related to Iran and tariffs; however, it later recovered during afternoon trade. Notably, Nvidia and Tesla stocks rebounded after facing recent losses. Overall, the stock market showed positive movement with the Dow and Nasdaq both higher amidst discussions on job numbers, tensions with Iran, and tariff updates. Nvidia's stock saw a rise in value, reflecting the overall upward trend in the market.
